labor_share.method: QCEW 2024 private total annual wages at 532310 ($2,031,042,709) x benefits multiplier 1.4294 [ECEC private-industry total comp $46.60/hr / wages $32.60/hr = 1.4294 (March 2026 reference period)] / SUSB 2022 receipts at 532310 ($4,470,766,000). Vintage mismatch: 2024 wages over 2022 receipts, stated. Level: 6-digit. Harmonized to IPS basis ÷1.3407 (median of 65 dual-method codes).

occupations.title: Laborers and Freight, Stock, and Material Movers, Hand
Mobile Heavy Equipment Mechanics, Except Engines
First-Line Supervisors of Retail Sales Workers
Bus and Truck Mechanics and Diesel Engine Specialists

n_band.derivation: margin 0.3000 (margins.json[532]: ESTIMATE: rental & leasing is asset-heavy with no clean Damodaran bucket (REITs 43.79% overstates operating rental); 30% chosen as a round mid-point before deriving results); revenue/employee $233,619 (SUSB 2022 receipts/employment at 532310); class <5: 1,038 firms, avg revenue/firm $453,660 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $136,098 -> out of $1-10M band; class 5-9: 501 firms, avg revenue/firm $1,155,172 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $346,551 -> out of $1-10M band; class 10-19: 294 firms, avg revenue/firm $2,713,272 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $813,982 -> out of $1-10M band; class 20-99: 220 firms, avg revenue/firm $6,547,391 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $1,964,217 -> IN $1-10M band; class 100-499: 31 firms, avg revenue/firm $26,592,645 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $7,977,794 -> IN $1-10M band; class 500+: 17 firms, avg revenue/firm $21,095,647 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $6,328,694 -> IN $1-10M band; n_band = 268
n_band.margin_source: ESTIMATE: rental & leasing is asset-heavy with no clean Damodaran bucket (REITs 43.79% overstates operating rental); 30% chosen as a round mid-point before deriving results
